## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, progress, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is ramping up: 3 articles published, 2 more scheduled, aiming for 4 next week](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Datagrid encourages faster pace and high risk tolerance; GrowthX to accelerate content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Need for improved visibility on content backlog and quarterly distribution](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Suggestion to include product images and CTAs in articles, balancing SEO and self-promotion](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [3 articles published, 2 more scheduled (1 today, 1 tomorrow)](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Images need fixing to align with brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Queue of articles created based on agreed topics/pillars](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Planning 3-4 more publications next week](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Gradual scaling to avoid sudden content blast](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Datagrid prefers faster pace; GrowthX can accelerate production](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Balancing indexing concerns with desire for more content](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Proposal to create content backlog for faster future publishing](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Need for quarterly content distribution overview](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Suggestion to include product images and CTAs in articles](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Exploring ways to naturally integrate Datagrid into article content](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)

### Outbound Campaign Update

  - [Running for 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [\~5k prospect list size](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Positive replies forwarded as link events](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Detailed update to be sent via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)

### Meeting Structure and Participation

  - [Jimmy absent due to conflict](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Introduction of Jen, new managing editor (onboarding)](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Noted absence of Renato, who should be included in future calls](https://fathom.video/share/FzyABN_weySi9TQLtcbYbxqxgP3o7GxA?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
